MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

The unopposed Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted.

Court to review the proposed order and the consent judgment.
